title: FunctionCode
description: The code for the Lambda function. You can provide your deployment package as a .zip file archive uploaded directly, from S3, or as a container image from Amazon ECR.

ZipFile.description: Base64-encoded contents of the deployment package .zip file

S3Bucket.description: An S3 bucket in the same AWS Region as your function

S3Key.description: The S3 key of the deployment package

S3ObjectVersion.description: The version of the S3 object for versioned buckets

ImageUri.description: URI of a container image in the Amazon ECR registry
